scripts.db:apply:projects: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && node scripts/run-sql.cjs supabase/migrations/0014_projects_snapshot.sql && node scripts/run-sql.cjs supabase/migrations/0015_project_campaign_work_items.sql'
